feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Connection failed error into SAP Business One Mobile application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have followed all the configuration part but SAP B1 mobile application is not working.

We have done configuration into SAP and into integration framework like JDBC, B1DI. Also generate the certificate from the integration framework and deployed this certificate into mobile device but application is not working.

Facing error like "connection failed" while login into SAP B1 Mobile application 

SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Duplicate business partner authorization
entry.content: SAP Business One should have authorization for the 'Duplicate Business Partner' option. Just like 'Duplicate documents and records' authorization.

entry.title: Find Order # for an Invoice
entry.content:
We just implemented SAP - Business One on 01/08/2024. I am creating a query to find all invoices that were produced for a given month.  The only thing I can't figure out is how to find the associated sales order number for an invoice.

I was told by our trainers that there was no way to do that because the sales order # is only stored as a comment on the invoice header.

Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Item Cost of Item
entry.content:
Hi
 
Is it possible that for a particular Item cost should always be 0. We have checked Stock release without item cost.
 
Thanks

entry.title: Printing Error: Full Document could not be printed: reduce the top and bottom margin (RPT-6723)
entry.content:
I'm getting an error in generating a crystal report while I'm using an Item Batch in GRPO
Printing Error: Full Document could not be printed: reduce the top and bottom margin (RPT-6723) (message 200-38)

entry.title: Connection failed error into SAP Business One Mobile application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have followed all the configuration part but SAP B1 mobile application is not working.

We have done configuration into SAP and into integration framework like JDBC, B1DI. Also generate the certificate from the integration framework and deployed this certificate into mobile device but application is not working.

Facing error like "connection failed" while login into SAP B1 Mobile application 

SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: How can we apply a Transaction Notification on HSN and SAC Master Data in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we apply a Transaction Notification on HSN and SAC Master Data in SAP Business One? We want to put some validations in these tables - cannot leave it open to users to add anything as they please.

entry.title: How to get actual stock quantity and it's actual warehouse BIN location ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to get warehouse report with SDK or Service or maybe SQL?

I want to see actual bin locations and it contained item card and quantity.

I found some SQL samples here but it shows DefauldbinLocaiton of item card. But I may put the items other bin locations from their default.

Shortly, How many items consist in the warehoue bin locations address?

Regards,

Mucip:)

entry.title: Can I download SAP Business One 10 without S-User ID?
entry.content: How I download SAP Business One 10 Trial version without S-User ID?

entry.title: Define stocklevels for multiple warehouses
entry.content:
Hi All,

We use multiple warehouses for our items and would like to define stocklevel data (minumum, maximum, order quantity) per warehouse.
Currently SAP B1 has one set of stocklevel data on item level that is applicable for all warehouses combined.

Does anyone know how to do this ?

Best regards, Vincent

entry.title: The server threw an exception. (exception from hresult: 0x80010105 (rpc_e_serverfault)) in sap b1
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

Sometime following error occured while loading form through xml in sdk addon. If you are facing same issue as "the server threw an exception. (exception from hresult: 0x80010105 (rpc_e_serverfault)) in sap b1" in design mode while preview form (b1studio) or in addon. do the following steps

01. Open xml form in B1 Studio

02. Change Type of the form from Form Properties. it should not be same as form uid property.

 

Best regards,

Mahendrakumar D.P.

entry.title: SAP Learning Groups
entry.content:
I created a UDF field (Business Partner Master Data) at row level on the delivery note but when added the DN data is disappeared. Basically, I need to link business partner data at row level to obtain some additional data from the OCRD table on my delivery note layout. 

Looking for help on this

Thanks in advance

entry.title: AR Credit Memo cancellation_Don't increase quantity.
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 
I have an AR Credit memo and it's cancellation. Both of them did not check for Without posting qty. The item master data also checks for the Inventory category.

However, I cannot find them in the Inventory Audit Report (already checked the right warehouse, from date to date). I don't know why.

Please help me how to check it.

Thank you so much.

entry.title: The database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be
entry.content:
Dear All,

All of clients is having a problem with SAP Business One.

Sometimes the message "The database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be closed,Do you want to continue adding the user-defined field?" appears for users, When they click "Ok", the message is displayed endlessly. The only way is to interrupt SAP Business One through the task manager.

The message appears when there is a period of inactivity on the PC or network interruption.

The perform data check option is not enabled on the database.

They are on SAP Business One (SQL Server), Version 10 FP2208 

Is someone facing the same problem? Do you have any ideas to help me solve this problem please?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: logged-in sales employee appears by default in the sales employee field in commercial documents
entry.content:
Hello,

We wish to apply the following configuration to the commercial documents (Offer, Order, Delivery):

· The name of the logged-in sales employee appears by default in the sales employee field.

· We do not want the system to display the name of the sales employee defined in the partner.

I have already defined default sales agent to user in user form,but always system select sales employee defined in the partner.

Could you please help resolving this issue ?

entry.title: Manual depreciation on sap
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I tried to create the following fixed asset acquisition on SAP B1 , 

After I created a manual depreciation on the same item,

Here you will find the details of the summary and amortization of the years:

The problems I have is that the total planned depreciation is different from the recorded depreciation (manual depreciation)

Second problem is that the depreciation recorded in the dates 2021 AND 2022 for each year must be 1126 MAD but SAP calculates 1128.

Third problem is that if I want to create another manual depreciation on the same item, the following error message is displayed:

NBV of asset "IM000003" cannot fall below zero; change the total

Any ideas ?

Regards

entry.title: Using SAP Business One Service layer with Visual Basic?
entry.content:
Hi,

I use SAP business One Service Layer with PHP/Curl without any problem.

But I could not use Service Layer with Visual Basic unfortunatelly. I always getting 500 error?!

I guess I am doing something wrong?!

Please is there any sample code with Visual Basic.net using Service Layer?

P.S.: I see B1SLayer.DLL but it written for C# And I could not use it with VB I don't know why?! 😞

Regards,

Mucip:)

entry.title: A/P Invoice Copied From Goods Receipt PO With Landed Cost Cannot Be Canceled
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I know this is a behavior of the system. But I cannot answer which are these inconsistencies here. Please help me to explain more details. 
Thank you so much.

entry.title: Thai Characters Font
entry.content:
Hi All

Which is the most suitable font for Thai characters to export properly from Crystal Report Design to PDF?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Inventory Posting List Default Posting Dates Range
entry.content:
Hi All
Is it possible to change Default Posting Dates Range in Inventory Posting List from Item Master Data?

We are able to define Posting Dates Range in Inventory Reports->Inventory Posting List to save most recent Dates Range in Selection Criteria.

 

Kedalene Chong
